themes.reasoning_notes: Scavenge converts this card in graveyard into a large batch of +1/+1 counters, making it a direct counters payoff/enabler.
A 4-mana 5/5 is a straightforward oversized body that pressures well in creature-based midrange shells.
It uses the graveyard as a resource, but does not return cards; this is only a weak graveyard-adjacent theme.
Scavenge turns it from the graveyard into five +1/+1 counters on another creature, a direct counters enabler with strong rate.
A 4-mana 5/5 is an efficient standalone body, but that rate is secondary to its counters role rather than a strong theme pull.
